sqlMap.select: select * from FirmPracticeLocationLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FirmPracticeLocationLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey FPLAddress FPLCity FPLCounty FPLZip NumberOfAttorneys NumberOfOtherEmployees NumberOfBillabeHours LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp FPLStateCode FPLZip4 ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #FPLAddress# #FPLCity# #FPLCounty# #FPLZip# #NumberOfAttorneys# #NumberOfOtherEmployees# #NumberOfBillabeHours# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #FPLStateCode# #FPLZip4# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FirmPracticeLocationLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select FirmPracticeLocationKey, FPLAddress, FPLCity, FPLCounty, FPLZip, NumberOfAttorneys, NumberOfOtherEmployees, NumberOfBillabeHours, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, FPLStateCode, FPLZip4, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmPracticeLocationLW where FirmPracticeLocationKey = #FirmPracticeLocationKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FirmPracticeLocationLW set
FPLAddress = #FPLAddress# FPLAddress = null FPLCity = #FPLCity# FPLCity = null FPLCounty = #FPLCounty# FPLCounty = null FPLZip = #FPLZip# FPLZip = null NumberOfAttorneys = #NumberOfAttorneys# NumberOfAttorneys = null NumberOfOtherEmployees = #NumberOfOtherEmployees# NumberOfOtherEmployees = null NumberOfBillabeHours = #NumberOfBillabeHours# NumberOfBillabeHours = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null FPLStateCode = #FPLStateCode# FPLStateCode = null FPLZip4 = #FPLZip4# FPLZip4 = null
where FirmPracticeLocationKey = #FirmPracticeLocationKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FirmPracticeLocationLW where FirmPracticeLocationKey = #FirmPracticeLocationKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FirmPracticeLocationLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select FirmPracticeLocationKey, FPLAddress, FPLCity, FPLCounty, FPLZip, NumberOfAttorneys, NumberOfOtherEmployees, NumberOfBillabeHours, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, FPLStateCode, FPLZip4, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmPracticeLocationLW where FirmPracticeLocationKey = #FirmPracticeLocationKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FirmPracticeLocationKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, FPLAddress, FPLCity, FPLCounty, FPLZip, NumberOfAttorneys, NumberOfOtherEmployees, NumberOfBillabeHours, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, FPLStateCode, FPLZip4 from FirmPracticeLocationLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
